contentBlocks.translation: O devi Janaki, I salute you; you are the destroyer of all sins.
contentBlocks.meanings: जानकि (jānaki) – O Janaki; त्वाम् (tvām) – you; नमस्यामि (namasyāmi) – I salute; सर्वपापप्रणाशिनीम् (sarvapāpapraṇāśinīm) – destroyer of all sins (sarva:all | pāpa:sins | praṇāśinīm:destroyer);

contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, you are the destroyer of poverty (in the battle of life) and bestower of wishes of the devotees,
you are the daughter of Videha raja (King Janaka), and cause of joy of Raghava (Sri Rama).
contentBlocks.meanings: दारिद्र्यरणसंहर्त्रीं (dāridryaraṇasaṃhartrīm) – destroyer of poverty in battle (dāridrya:poverty | raṇa:battle | saṃhartrī:destroyer); भक्तानाम् (bhaktānām) – of the devotees; अभिष्टदायिनीम् (abhiṣṭadāyinīm) – bestower of wishes (abhiṣṭa:wishes | dāyinī:bestower); विदेहराजतनयाम् (videharājatanayām) – daughter of Videha king (videha:Videha | rāja:king | tanayā:daughter); राघवानन्दकारिणीम् (rāghavānandakāriṇīm) – cause of joy of Raghava (rāghava:Raghava | ānanda:joy | kāriṇī:cause);

contentBlocks.original:
भूमेर्दुहितरं विद्यां नमामि प्रकृतिं शिवाम् ।
पौलस्त्यैश्वर्यसंहत्रीं भक्ताभीष्टां सरस्वतीम् ॥३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
bhūmerduhitaraṃ vidyāṃ namāmi prakṛtiṃ śivām .
paulastyaiśvaryasaṃhatrīṃ bhaktābhīṣṭāṃ sarasvatīm ..3..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, you are the daughter of the earth and the embodiment of knowledge; you are the auspicious prakriti,
you are the destroyer of the power and supremacy of (oppressors like) Ravana, (and at the same time) fulfiller of the wishes of the devotees; you are an embodiment of Saraswati.
contentBlocks.meanings: भूमेः (bhūmeḥ) – of the earth; दुहितरम् (duhitaram) – daughter; विद्याम् (vidyām) – knowledge; नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; प्रकृतिम् (prakṛtim) – prakriti; शिवाम् (śivām) – auspicious; पौलस्त्य (paulastya) – Ravana; ऐश्वर्य (aiśvarya) – supremacy; संहत्रीम् (saṃhatrīm) – destroyer; भक्त (bhakta) – devotees; अभिष्टाम् (abhīṣṭām) – fulfiller of wishes; सरस्वतीम् (sarasvatīm) – Saraswati;

contentBlocks.original:
पतिव्रताधुरीणां त्वां नमामि जनकात्मजाम् ।
अनुग्रहपरामृद्धिमनघां हरिवल्लभाम् ॥४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pativratādhurīṇāṃ tvāṃ namāmi janakātmajām .
anugrahaparāmṛddhimanaghāṃ harivallabhām ..4..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, you are the best among pativratas (ideal wife devoted to husband), (and at the same time) the soul of Janaka (ideal daughter devoted to father),
you are very gracious (being yourself the embodiment of) Riddhi (Lakshmi), (pure and) sinless, and extremely beloved of Hari.
contentBlocks.meanings: पतिव्रताधुरीणाम् (pativratādhurīṇām) – best among pativratas (pativratā:devoted wife | adhurīṇām:best among); त्वाम् (tvām) – you; नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; जनकात्मजाम् (janakātmajām) – daughter of Janaka (janaka:Janaka | ātmajām:daughter); अनुग्रहपराम् (anugrahaparām) – very gracious (anugraha:grace | parām:very); ऋद्धिम् (ṛddhim) – Riddhi (Lakshmi); अनघाम् (anaghām) – sinless; हरिवल्लभाम् (harivallabhām) – beloved of Hari (hari:Hari | vallabhām:beloved);

contentBlocks.original:
आत्मविद्यां त्रयीरूपामुमारूपां नमाम्यहम् ।
प्रसादाभिमुखीं लक्ष्मीं क्षीराब्धितनयां शुभाम् ॥५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ātmavidyāṃ trayīrūpāmumārūpāṃ namāmyaham .
prasādābhimukhīṃ lakṣmīṃ kṣīrābdhitanayāṃ śubhām ..5..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, you are the embodiment of Atma Vidya, mentioned in the three Vedas (manifesting its inner beauty in life); you are of the nature of devi Uma,
you are the auspicious Lakshmi, the daughter of the milky ocean, and always intent on bestowing grace (to the devotees).
contentBlocks.meanings: आत्मविद्यां (ātmavidyāṃ) – knowledge of the self (ātma:self | vidyāṃ:knowledge); त्रयीरूपाम् (trayīrūpām) – of the form of the three Vedas (trayī:three Vedas | rūpām:form); उमारूपाम् (umārūpām) – of the form of Uma (umā:Uma | rūpām:form); नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; अहम् (aham) – I; प्रसादाभिमुखीम् (prasādābhimukhīm) – intent on bestowing grace (prasāda:grace | abhimukhīm:intent on); लक्ष्मीम् (lakṣmīm) – Lakshmi; क्षीराब्धितनयाम् (kṣīrābdhitanayām) – daughter of the milky ocean (kṣīra:milky | abdhi:ocean | tanayām:daughter); शुभाम् (śubhām) – auspicious;

contentBlocks.original:
नमामि चन्द्रभगिनीं सीतां सर्वाङ्गसुन्दरीम् ।
नमामि धर्मनिलयां करुणां वेदमातरम् ॥६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namāmi candrabhaginīṃ sītāṃ sarvāṅgasundarīm .
namāmi dharmanilayāṃ karuṇāṃ vedamātaram ..6..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, you are like the sister of Chandra (in beauty), you are Sita who is beautiful in her entirety,
you are an abode of dharma, full of compassion and the mother of vedas.
contentBlocks.meanings: नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; चन्द्रभगिनीं (candrabhaginīṃ) – sister of Chandra (candra:Chandra | bhaginīṃ:sister); सीतां (sītāṃ) – Sita; सर्वाङ्गसुन्दरीम् (sarvāṅgasundarīm) – beautiful in entirety (sarva:all | aṅga:limbs | sundarīm:beautiful); नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; धर्मनिलयां (dharmanilayāṃ) – abode of dharma (dharma:dharma | nilayāṃ:abode); करुणां (karuṇāṃ) – compassion; वेदमातरम् (vedamātaram) – mother of vedas (veda:vedas | mātaram:mother);

contentBlocks.original:
पद्मालयां पद्महस्तां विष्णुवक्षःस्थलालयाम् ।
नमामि चन्द्रनिलयां सीतां चन्द्रनिभाननाम् ॥७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
padmālayāṃ padmahastāṃ viṣṇuvakṣaḥsthalālayām .
namāmi candranilayāṃ sītāṃ candranibhānanām ..7..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, (you as devi Lakshmi) abide in lotus, hold lotus in your hands, and always reside in the heart of Sri Vishnu,
you reside in chandra mandala, you are Sita whose face resembles the moon.
contentBlocks.meanings: पद्मालयाम् (padmālayām) – abide in lotus (padma:lotus | ālayām:abide in); पद्महस्ताम् (padmahastām) – hold lotus in hands (padma:lotus | hastām:in hands); विष्णुवक्षःस्थलालयाम् (viṣṇuvakṣaḥsthalālayām) – reside in Vishnu's heart (viṣṇu:Vishnu | vakṣaḥ:chest | sthala:place | ālayām:reside in); नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; चन्द्रनिलयाम् (candranilayām) – reside in moon (candra:moon | nilayām:reside in); सीताम् (sītām) – Sita; चन्द्रनिभाननाम् (candranibhānanām) – moon-like face (candra:moon | nibha:like | ānanām:face);

contentBlocks.original:
आह्लादरूपिणीं सिद्धिं शिवां शिवकरीं सतीम् ।
नमामि विश्वजननीं रामचन्द्रेष्टवल्लभाम् ।
सीतां सर्वानवद्याङ्गीं भजामि सततं हृदा ॥८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āhlādarūpiṇīṃ siddhiṃ śivāṃ śivakarīṃ satīm .
namāmi viśvajananīṃ rāmacandreṣṭavallabhām .
sītāṃ sarvānavadyāṅgīṃ bhajāmi satataṃ hṛdā ..8..
contentBlocks.translation:
I salute you, your form gives joy to all, you are the Sati (devoted wife) whose presence is auspicious and confers siddhi and liberation,
I salute the mother of the universe, who is the beloved of Ramachandra,
I always worship you in my heart, O mother Sita, you are beautiful in entirety, the beauty which cannot be expressed in words.
contentBlocks.meanings: आह्लादरूपिणीं (āhlādarūpiṇīṃ) – form giving joy (āhlāda:joy | rūpiṇīṃ:having the form); सिद्धिं (siddhiṃ) – siddhi; शिवां (śivāṃ) – auspicious; शिवकरीं (śivakarīṃ) – conferring auspiciousness (śiva:auspicious | karīṃ:conferring); सतीम् (satīm) – devoted wife; नमामि (namāmi) – I salute; विश्वजननीं (viśvajananīṃ) – mother of the universe (viśva:universe | jananīṃ:mother); रामचन्द्रेष्टवल्लभाम् (rāmacandreṣṭavallabhām) – beloved of Ramachandra (rāmacandra:Ramachandra | iṣṭa:beloved | vallabhām:beloved); सीतां (sītāṃ) – Sita; सर्वानवद्याङ्गीं (sarvānavadyāṅgīṃ) – beautiful in entirety (sarva:entire | anavadya:flawless | aṅgīṃ:having limbs); भजामि (bhajāmi) – I worship; सततं (satataṃ) – always; हृदा (hṛdā) – in my heart;
